Metadata.title: Studio Portfolio
Metadata.description: A dual-surface portfolio platform with a public website, lightweight CMS, and snapshot-based publishing workflow.

footer.line2: Product engineering · Content platforms · Interactive experiences

contact.heading: Tell us about your next product.
contact.lead: Share what you are building, the scope you have in mind, and your timeline. We will help shape the approach and delivery path.
contact.formNote: Opens your email app with the brief pre-filled.

brief.name: brief
brief.label: Quick brief
brief.placeholder: What are you building, and when do you need it?

Hero.headline: Designing and building thoughtful digital products.
Hero.lead: Studio Portfolio demonstrates a public website paired with a lightweight CMS — members, projects, bilingual content, and snapshot publishing in one cohesive workflow.

prize.title: Dual-surface workflow
prize.body: Draft in the CMS, publish to JSON snapshots, and serve the public site from the same canonical data layer.

section.heading: Capabilities reflected in this reference build.
section.aside: Product engineering, frontend development, content platforms, and interactive experiences — composed into one maintainable monorepo.

cards.title: Product engineering
cards.body: End-to-end implementation of modern web products with clear boundaries between CMS, data layer, and public experience.

cards.title: Frontend development
cards.body: Responsive interfaces, bilingual routing, accessible components, and performance-conscious delivery patterns.

cards.title: Content platforms
cards.body: Public experiences paired with lightweight management workflows, draft/publish states, and snapshot serialization.

Works.disclaimer: Demo projects are fictional examples included to illustrate the publishing workflow.

section.heading: Fictional case studies from the demo dataset.
section.aside: Atlas Commerce, Northstar Dashboard, and Frame Studio show how projects, case studies, and bilingual content flow through the platform.

items.title: Atlas Commerce
items.description: E-commerce platform with an optimized checkout flow and mobile-first purchase path.

items.title: Northstar Dashboard
items.description: Real-time analytics dashboard with clear information hierarchy and responsive layouts.

items.title: Frame Studio
items.description: Portfolio builder for creative studios with CMS-backed project management.

section.heading: From content model to published snapshot.
section.aside: Strategy, implementation, and publishing stay in one loop so the platform remains understandable and maintainable.

steps.title: Model the content
steps.body: Define members, projects, site settings, and bilingual fields with a schema that matches the public experience.

steps.title: Draft in the CMS
steps.body: Edit content in a focused workspace with validation, previews, and clear draft versus published states.

steps.title: Publish snapshots
steps.body: Serialize published records into JSON snapshots consumed by the public site without redeploying application code.

steps.title: Ship the experience
steps.body: Serve team directories, project case studies, and contact flows from the same canonical demo dataset.

section.heading: Demo members from the published snapshot.
section.aside: Alex Nguyen and Jordan Lee illustrate how member profiles flow from CMS drafts to the public team directory.

members.bio: Builds modern web products and platform experiences.
Designs interface systems and user experiences.

atlas-commerce.title: Atlas Commerce
atlas-commerce.text: A fictional e-commerce reference focused on mobile conversion, checkout clarity, and a maintainable product surface.
points: Low mobile conversion on a legacy checkout path.
Redesigned checkout flow with fewer steps and clearer state.
32% conversion uplift in the demo narrative.

northstar-dashboard.title: Northstar Dashboard
northstar-dashboard.text: A real-time analytics dashboard example emphasizing scanability, responsive layouts, and dense data presentation.
points: Operational metrics for product and growth teams.
Componentized charts with consistent visual hierarchy.
A dashboard pattern reusable across product lines.

frame-studio.title: Frame Studio
frame-studio.text: A portfolio builder concept showing how creative studios can manage projects and publish case studies from one workflow.
points: Studios need CMS-backed portfolios without heavy infrastructure.
Lightweight editor, bilingual fields, and snapshot publishing.
A reference pattern for dual-surface content platforms.

team.title: Members published through the CMS.
team.lead: Explore demo member profiles and their related project references from the snapshot layer.
